---
title: "Alcohol refusal"
format: html
---

# Refusal Skills Practice

Use this worksheet to practice how you will respond when offered alcohol. Building and rehearsing these skills can increase confidence and reduce pressure in high-risk situations.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/no.jpg?raw=true){fig-align="center"}


------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 1. Situation

Describe a realistic scenario where you might be offered a drink:

-   **Location:**\
-   **Who is offering:**\
-   **Context (party, dinner, etc.):**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2. Pressure Level

-   How much pressure do you expect (0–10)? **\_\_\_\_\_**

What type of pressure?

-   [ ] Direct (“Want a drink?”)\
-   [ ] Social (“Everyone’s doing it”)\
-   [ ] Persistent (“Come on, just one”)\
-   [ ] Subtle/implicit\
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 3. Your Refusal Response

Write 2–3 ways you could say no:

1.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

2.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

3.  

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 4. Style of Response

Check what approach you used:

-   [ ] Direct (“No thanks”)\
-   [ ] Brief explanation (“I’m not drinking tonight”)\
-   [ ] Deflection (“I’ve got an early morning”)\
-   [ ] Humor\
-   [ ] Change the subject\
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 5. Body Language Practice

-   [ ] Eye contact\
-   [ ] Confident tone\
-   [ ] Relaxed posture\
-   [ ] No apologizing

How confident did it feel (0–10)? **\_\_\_\_\_**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 6. Backup Plan

If they keep insisting, what will you say?

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 7. Follow-Up Action

What will you do immediately after refusing?

-   [ ] Get a non-alcoholic drink\
-   [ ] Talk to someone supportive\
-   [ ] Change activity/location\
-   [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 8. Reflection

-   What felt strong about your response?

> 

-   What could be improved?

> 

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout

## Practice Goal

Next time I’m offered a drink, I will try:

> 
:::
